description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:16.0.0-slim Docker image. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update, installs xvfb and firefox-esr, installs gulp-cli globally via npm, and runs npm install. Define a single stage called test and a job named test that runs in this stage, executes gulp -v, gulp build, and gulp unit, and is limited to runners with the gitlab-org tag. No caches, artifacts, or special triggers are defined.
